function[T0: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0]) { Option.some[Subsemigroup[T0]](submonoid_to_subsemigroup[T0](x0)) = Subsemigroup.new[T0](x0.contains) }[M](s)
let w0: M satisfy { w0 ∈ s != w0 ∈ submonoid_to_subsemigroup[M](s) }

function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: Subsemigroup[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[Subsemigroup[T0]](x0) != Subsemigroup.new[T0](x1) or x2 ∈ x0 = x1(x2) }[M](submonoid_to_subsemigroup[M](s), s.contains, w0)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0]) { Set.new[T0](x0.contains) = x0.as_set }[M](s)
function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: Subsemigroup[T0]) { Set.new[T0](x0.contains) = x0.as_set }[M](submonoid_to_subsemigroup[M](s))
function[T0: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0]) { submonoid_to_subsemigroup[T0](x0).contains = x0.contains }[M](s)

function[T0: Monoid, T2: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0], x1: MonoidHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = submonoid_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[N, M](s, f, a)
function[T0: Monoid, T2: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0], x1: MonoidHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = submonoid_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[N, M](s, f, b)
function[T0: Monoid, T2: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0], x1: MonoidHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = submonoid_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[N, M](s, f, a * b)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1) or not x0(x2) or x0(x1 * x2) } = submonoid_closure_constraint[T0](x0) }[M](submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s))
let w0: M satisfy { exists(k0: M) { submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, w0) and submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, k0) and not submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, w0 * k0) } }
let w1: M satisfy { submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, w0) and submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, w1) and not submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, w0 * w1) }
let w2: M satisfy { submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, w0) and submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, w2) and not submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, w0 * w2) }
function(x0: M, x1: M) { not submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, x0) or not submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, x1) or submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, x0 * x1) }(w0, w2)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (submonoid_identity_constraint[T0](x0) and submonoid_closure_constraint[T0](x0)) = submonoid_constraint[T0](x0) }[M](submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s))

function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0 -> Bool) { not Submonoid.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: Submonoid[T0]) { Submonoid.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[Submonoid[T0]](k0) } }[M](submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s))

goal: submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, s).contains(a) = submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s, a)
proof: function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: Submonoid[T1]) { Option.some[Submonoid[T0]](submonoid_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = Submonoid.new[T0](submonoid_preimage_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1)) }[M, N](f, s)

function[T0: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[Submonoid[T0]](x0) != Submonoid.new[T0](x1) or x2 ∈ x0 = x1(x2) }[M](submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, s), submonoid_preimage_contains[M, N](f, s), a)

goal: submonoid_subset[N](s, t) = forall(x0: N) { s.contains(x0) implies t.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0], x1: Submonoid[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submonoid_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[N](s, t)
(forall(x0: N) { not x0 ∈ s or x0 ∈ t } = true)
function(x0: N) { not (x0 ∈ s and not x0 ∈ t) }(f.hom(a))

function[T0: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0], x1: Submonoid[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submonoid_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[M](submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, s), submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, t))

goal: submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, s.intersection(t)).contains(a) = submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, s).intersection(submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, t)).contains(a)

proof: let w0: M satisfy { w0 ∈ submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, s ∩ t) != w0 ∈ submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, s) ∩ submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, t) }

function[T0: Monoid](x0: Submonoid[T0], x1: Submonoid[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submonoid_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[M](full_submonoid[M], submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, full_submonoid[N]))
let w0: M satisfy { w0 ∈ full_submonoid[M] and not w0 ∈ submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, full_submonoid[N]) }
function(x0: M) { not x0 ∈ full_submonoid[M] or x0 ∈ submonoid_preimage[M, N](f, full_submonoid[N]) }(w0)
function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1]) { submonoid_preimage[T0, T1](x0, identity_submonoid[T1]) = monoid_hom_kernel[T0, T1](x0) }[M, N](f)
